modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: How to see my submitted tickets in Coyote One Stop

full_description_text:
- I submitted some tickets using the self-service form.  
- Now I want to see them but I don't know how.  
- I was just trying to check the status of my requests.  
- It's really confusing and I need help with this.
short_description: How to see my submitted tickets in Coyote One Stop
description:
